result.stdout:
ManicTimeMcp 0.2.44+f173e8a92d
MCP server for read-only access to local ManicTime activity data. Independent integration — not affiliated with or endorsed by ManicTime or Finkit.
Scopes:
  activity ...   
  prompt ...     
  resource ...   
  screenshot ... 
  summary ...    
  timeline ...   
  usage ...      
  workspace ...  

Global Options:
  --help                  Show help for current scope or command.
  --interactive           Force interactive mode.
  --no-interactive        Prevent interactive mode.
  --no-logo               Disable banner rendering.
  --output:<format>       Set output format (for example json, yaml, xml, markd...
  --answer:<name>[=value] Provide prompt answers in non-interactive execution.

Global Commands:
  help [path] Show help for current path or a specific path. Aliases: ?
  ..          Go up one level in interactive mode.
  exit        Leave interactive mode.
